name: smart-promptcreator-landingpage
description: Landingpage for the SMART PromptCreator browser app.

scripts.build: cp index.source.html index.html && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit && vite build
scripts.publish:root: npm run build && mkdir -p assets && cp dist/index.html index.html && cp dist/app-logo.png app-logo.png && cp dist/hero-app-screenshot.png hero-app-screenshot.png && cp dist/hero-promptcreator-workbench.png hero-promptcreator-workbench.png && cp dist/assets/* assets/
